name: sheet
description: A modal side panel that slides in from any of the four viewport edges (the shadcn-shaped generalisation of drawer): dialog ARIA, focus trap, Escape and backdrop-click close, structured header/footer/title/description slots, and a built-in Lucide close button. Token-driven overlay + z-index.
docs: Register <lv-sheet> by importing components/ui/sheet.ts from your entry point. Bind `open` to control visibility; set `side` to 'right' (default) | 'left' | 'top' | 'bottom'. Set `heading` + `description` (or project the `title` / `description` slots), the body via the default slot, actions via the `footer` slot. Listen for `lv-close` to update state. Toggle `show-close` and `dismissible` as needed. Note: <lv-drawer> remains for the simpler heading+body shape; <lv-sheet> is the richer composition.
